name: Nothing Man {Sodikken}
description:
Nothing man is owned by Sodikken!! I honestly don't know much about him but I had fun making this, hope you enjoy!

He's extremely lazy although he doesn't want to be seen as useless ♥️

(I honestly headcanon him as trans, I find it cute!)
